'''padhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quackishly|quackishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quackishly|quackishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| padhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:padhate|padhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:padhatesher|padhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhatesherĂ«m|padhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:padhatero|padhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:padhateshĂ«|padhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhateshĂ«m|padhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipadhatero|gokipadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipadhateshĂ«|gokipadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhateshĂ«m|gokipadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopadhankerom|gopadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopadhankeshĂ«|gopadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhankeshĂ«m|gopadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopadhankeya|gopadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:padhaterom|padhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhatemu|padhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:padhateya|padhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipadhaterom|gokipadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhatemu|gokipadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipadhateya|gokipadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:padhadhate|padhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:padhadhatesher|padhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhadhatesherĂ«m|padhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:padhadhatero|padhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:padhadhateshĂ«|padhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhadhateshĂ«m|padhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipadhadhatero|gokipadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipadhadhateshĂ«|gokipadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhadhateshĂ«m|gokipadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopadhadhankerom|gopadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopadhadhankeshĂ«|gopadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhadhankeshĂ«m|gopadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopadhadhankeya|gopadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:padhadhaterom|padhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhadhatemu|padhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:padhadhateya|padhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipadhadhaterom|gokipadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhadhatemu|gokipadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipadhadhateya|gokipadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠdhĂŠte|pĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠdhĂŠtesher|pĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠdhĂŠtero|pĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokipĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠdhĂŠterom|pĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠdhĂŠtemu|pĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠdhĂŠteya|pĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokipĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokipĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafdhafte|pafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafdhaftesher|pafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafdhaftesherĂ«m|pafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafdhaftero|pafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafdhafteshĂ«|pafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafdhafteshĂ«m|pafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafdhaftero|gokipafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafdhafteshĂ«|gokipafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafdhafteshĂ«m|gokipafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafdhafnkerom|gopafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafdhafnkeshĂ«|gopafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafdhafnkeshĂ«m|gopafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafdhafnkeya|gopafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafdhafterom|pafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafdhaftemu|pafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafdhafteya|pafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafdhafterom|gokipafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafdhaftemu|gokipafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafdhafteya|gokipafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
